mode (this[32]=v6; open/arm result - any byte not 60 or 61) - CUIItemUpgrade::OnItemUpgradeResult 0x799d61, reached via CUIItemUpgrade::OnPacket 0x799d4b (a2==330)

world status (2 bytes; v79 sub_5CE217@0x5ce217 reads as 2 × Decode1, atlas writes WriteShort — wire-equivalent)

CScriptMan::OnAskAvatar#AskAvatar.notes: v79 OnAskAvatar@0x6c8a31: DecodeStr message, Decode1 count, count x Decode4 style id (InsertBefore). Matches Atlas AskAvatarConversationDetail (AsciiString+Byte count+Int*count). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskBoxText#AskBoxText.notes: v79 ask-box-text detail body DecodeStr(message)+DecodeStr(default)+Decode2(col)+Decode2(line) is read by the msgType-2 arm @0x6c81b1 (IDA symbol OnAskYesNo; 3-cycle rotation, body is ground truth). Matches Atlas AskBoxTextConversationDetail (AsciiString+AsciiString+Short+Short). task-113 stage E close.

calls.comment: count (cash-avatar SN entries; 0 for the legacy range, Atlas drives no candidates)

CScriptMan::OnAskMembershopAvatar#AskMem.notes: v79 CScriptMan::OnAskMembershopAvatar@0x6c8bc8 (msgType 9 = ASK_MEMBER_SHOP_AVATAR): DecodeStr(message @0x6c8be2) + Decode1(count @0x6c8bfb) + count x [DecodeBuffer(&v15,8 @0x6c8c45)=cash item SN int64 + Decode1(@0x6c8c4d) byte] (candidates read from the incoming packet then looked up via CharacterData::GetItem(5,slot)). That per-entry format (int64 SN + byte) is incompatible with the v83+ int32 style-id list; Atlas has no server-side SN data to drive it, so count=0 for the legacy range. Atlas AskMemberShopAvatarConversationDetail (GMS<83 gate): AsciiString(Message)+WriteByte(0) -> matches DecodeStr+Decode1(0). v83 @0x74730b read Decode4 style ids.

CScriptMan::OnAskMenu#AskMenu.notes: v79 CScriptMan::OnAskMenu@0x6c8863 merged the avatar-style menu into ASK_MENU: DecodeStr(message) + Decode1(count) + Decode4 x count (avatar look ids, SetUtilDlgEx_AVATAR). v83 @0x746fad / v95 @0x6dce00 read a plain single string with no count. Atlas uses ASK_MENU only for plain #L# text menus -> count=0, no styles. msgType byte routing this handler is 7 in v79 (4 in v83, 5 in v95).

calls.comment: count (avatar look ids; 0 for plain #L# text menus)

CScriptMan::OnAskMenu#Selection.notes: v79 ask-menu selection reply: after the msgType+action frame the client appends Encode1(selection index) (OnAskMenu@0x6c89d6 Encode1(v18)). Narrow (single byte) for v79. Matches Atlas ContinueConversationSelection narrow (Byte selection). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskNumber#AskNumber.notes: v79 ask-number detail body DecodeStr(message)+Decode4(default)+Decode4(min)+Decode4(max) is read by the msgType-3 arm @0x6c8525 (IDA symbol OnAskBoxText; 3-cycle rotation, body is ground truth). Matches Atlas AskNumberConversationDetail (AsciiString+Int+Int+Int). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskPetAll#AskPetAll.notes: v79 OnAskPet@0x6c8e82 is the unified pet handler (dispatcher case 10): DecodeStr message, Decode1 count, Decode1 exceptionExists, count x (DecodeBuffer(8) cash sn + Decode1). Matches Atlas AskPetAllConversationDetail (AsciiString+Byte count+Bool exceptionExists+(Long+Byte)*count). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskQuiz#AskQuiz.notes: v79 quiz reader sub_970BAA@0x970baa (dispatcher case 5 -> sub_6C9148 -> sub_970BAA): Decode1 fail; if !fail DecodeStr title, DecodeStr problem, DecodeStr hint, Decode4 min, Decode4 max, Decode4(*1000) timeRemaining. Matches Atlas AskQuizConversationDetail (Bool+[AsciiString*3+Int*3]). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskSpeedQuiz#AskSpeedQuiz.notes: v79 speed-quiz reader sub_970D07@0x970d07 (dispatcher case 6 -> sub_6C915A): Decode1 fail; if !fail Decode4 type, Decode4 answer, Decode4 correct, Decode4 remain, Decode4(*1000) timeRemaining. Matches Atlas AskSpeedQuizConversationDetail (Bool+[Int*5]). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskText#AskText.notes: v79 OnAskText@0x6c836c: DecodeStr message, DecodeStr default, Decode2 min, Decode2 max. Matches Atlas AskTextConversationDetail (AsciiString+AsciiString+Short+Short). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskText#Reply.notes: v79 ask-text reply: after the msgType+action frame the client appends EncodeStr(text) (OnAskText@0x6c84ad EncodeStr on result==1). Matches Atlas ContinueConversationText (AsciiString text). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnAskYesNo#AskYesNo.notes: v79 ask-yes/no detail body is DecodeStr(message) only. The handler reading it is the msgType-4 arm @0x6c86d3 (IDA symbol OnAskNumber; the v79 {YesNo,BoxText,Number} handler symbols are a clean 3-cycle rotation, body is ground truth). Matches Atlas AskYesNoConversationDetail (AsciiString). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnSay#Reply.notes: v79 NPC conversation reply frame: the per-msgType handler builds COutPacket(58) Encode1 msgType + Encode1 action (e.g. OnSay@0x6c7fd4 Encode1(0)+Encode1(action)). Matches Atlas ContinueConversation (Byte lastMessageType + Byte action). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnSay#Say.notes: v79 OnSay@0x6c7ed1 detail body: [Decode4 secondaryNpcTemplateId if param&4], DecodeStr message, Decode1 previous, Decode1 next. Matches Atlas SayConversationDetail (AsciiString+Bool(prev)+Bool(next)). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnSayImage#SayImage.notes: v79 OnSayImage@0x6c8052 reads a single DecodeStr (one image path) with NO count prefix; the count-prefixed multi-image list was introduced after v79 (v83 @0x961275, v95 @0x6dc310 read Decode1 count + count x DecodeStr). Atlas SayImageConversationDetail gates GMS<83 to a single image string (no count). task-113 stage E close.

CScriptMan::OnScriptMessage.notes: v79 NPC conversation frame dispatcher @0x6c7d3e: Decode1 speakerTypeId, Decode4 speakerTemplateId, Decode1 msgType, Decode1 param. If (param&4) the secondaryNpcTemplateId Decode4 is read at the head of each per-msgType handler (e.g. OnSay@0x6c7ef3). Matches Atlas NpcConversation.Encode (Byte+Int+Byte+Byte+[Int if param&4]+detail). task-113 stage E close.
